name: Master Drilling Group Limited
summary: Master Drilling Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides specialized drilling services to blue chip major and mid-tier companies in the mining, civil engineering, construction, and hydro-electric power sectors. The company offers rock boring services, including raise, horizontal raise, slot, tunnel, blind hole, and reef boring; slim drilling services, such as blast hole, de-watering, core, percussion, reverse circulation, and mud and air rotary drilling; and support services, which include directional drilling, stage and remote-operated shaft support, piling, scan mobile, analyzing ore, and core yard management. It operates in Africa, Central and North America, South America, and internationally. Master Drilling Group Limited was founded in 1986 and is based in Fochville, South Africa.
